title: oxalis platylepis
intro: Oxalis platylepis, also known as the "Purple Sorrel" or "Wood Sorrel", is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of oxalic acid. The health benefits of Oxalis platylepis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Oxalis platylepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in water, or used as a supplement, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
